chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5658 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.23774/2025 3. For hearing of main case 12.03.2026 None present for the petitioner M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith SI Muhammad Yasin Arain, P.S Kalri, City District, South Zone, Karachi ---------------------- SI Muhammad Yasin Arain files reply on behalf of SHO, P.S Kalri, City District, South Zone, Karachi alongwith copy of FIR No.322/2025 registered with P.S Kalri, District City, South, Karachi under Sections 406 PPC and submits that the alleged missing person namely Bilawal S/o Abdul Rahim has been arrested in the aforesaid criminal case, hence he is no more missing person, therefore, purpose of this petition has been served. In view of above, petition in hand is hereby dismissed having become infructuous alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
